extra.reason: t11 fix verified: worker B successfully downloaded 3 room keys from backup and processed phase-2 echo session to exit_code=0. Root cause was Stdio::piped() deadlock in start_worker test helper, not backup/reencrypt logic. Fix committed as 93e527d on feat/key-backup-and-encryption-fixes.

t11 fix verified: worker B successfully downloaded 3 room keys from backup and processed phase-2 echo session to exit_code=0. Root cause was Stdio::piped() deadlock in start_worker test helper, not backup/reencrypt logic. Fix committed as 93e527d on feat/key-backup-and-encryption-fixes.
Test reorder + fast-fail helper landed in working tree; new ordering confirmed (t00-t10-t20-t44 pass before we discovered the underlying discovery/idempotency bugs blocking t30+)
Restructured e2e_profile.rs: single orchestrator with 8 phases, E2E_PRESET env var, federated tests reuse persistent worker, long+SSH tests parallel via std::thread::spawn
Added delete_room_alias to MatrixClient, state_room get_or_create now deletes stale alias and retries on M_ROOM_IN_USE
Added matrix_account field to key log statements in worker lib.rs and state_room.rs
Client daemon now logs to ~/.mxdx/logs/{profile}.log by default instead of /dev/null. E2E test truncates log at start and prints path.
run_client_daemon now passes MXDX_CLIENT_LOG_FILE to child processes. Daemon logs to ~/.mxdx/logs/{profile}.log by default.
Duplicate task guard now checks both session_manager and thread_roots map (which persists after session completion)
run_client_daemon now takes timeout_secs parameter. Echo and exit-code tests use 10s, md5sum 330s, ping 90s.
Fixed: replaced recovery/keychain backup path with direct SDK backups API. Warnings dropped from 211 to 4.
REST-based tombstoning implemented. t43 passes. PR #18 created.
Implemented federatedLeave(), updated purge script with cross-server phase, added pre-test cleanup to e2e-test-suite.sh, ran one-shot fix: 70/70 stale rooms cleaned across federation

T-20 complete. crates/mxdx-p2p/src/turn.rs implemented in commit 90f368c. 16/16 native unit tests pass (cargo test -p mxdx-p2p --lib turn). Wasm target compiles clean (cargo check -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown). Security grep gate green. Redacted Debug + Drop zeroize ensure creds never logged/leaked/persisted. Next: T-21 (mxdx-awe.10) wires TurnRefreshTask on top of this surface.

T-21 complete. TurnRefreshTask + TurnRefreshOutcome + trigger_refresh_now + shutdown implemented in commit cfa03e0. 6 refresh-loop tests (24 total turn::tests) pass under tokio::time::pause. Exponential backoff schedule [5,10,20,40,60] capped at hard_expiry. Reconnect-race serialization exposed via trigger_refresh_now(); Phase 5 P2PTransport wires. WebRtcChannel::restart_ice integration deferred to Phase 3/5 as instructed. Wasm target clean. Security grep gate green.

T-22 complete. crates/mxdx-p2p/README.md documents the smoke procedure (env vars, shell recipe, expected output, security notes). crates/mxdx-p2p/tests/turn_smoke.rs with #[ignore] exists and is correctly skipped by cargo test -p mxdx-p2p (0 passed; 1 ignored). CI stays network-free. Live beta run not performed in this session (agent has no TEST_TOKEN); operator-runnable procedure is documented. Commit b2f36a4.

T-30 complete. Commit 20e9cfe. WebRtcChannel trait at crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/mod.rs with async_trait cfg-gated for ?Send on wasm. All methods match storm §2.2. ChannelEvent {LocalIce, Message, Open, Closed{reason}, Failure}, IceServer {urls, username, credential}, Sdp {kind, sdp}, SdpKind {Offer, Answer}, IceCandidate {candidate, sdp_mid, sdp_mline_index}, ChannelError with RestartIceUnsupported variant documenting datachannel 0.16 limitation. MAX_INBOUND_FRAME_SIZE=1MiB, EVENT_QUEUE_DEPTH=256 exposed per storm §4.4. 5 unit tests pass. cargo check on both targets green, 0 new clippy warnings, security-grep clean. native.rs is a stub ready for T-31.

T-31 complete. Commit 6a541f4. Native WebRtcChannel at crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/native.rs using datachannel 0.16 with vendored libdatachannel. Callback-to-mpsc bridge via bounded channel (depth 256, non-blocking try_send for libdatachannel C-thread safety). tokio oneshot surfaces first on_description to async create_offer/accept_offer. Pending-candidate buffer mirrors npm reference. restart_ice returns RestartIceUnsupported (datachannel-sys 0.23 FFI limitation — Phase 5 will tear-down-and-reinvite). Cardinal rule preserved: on_message logs only size at DEBUG, never payload; send path silent; oversize frames (>1MiB) dropped. Tests: 57 passed (was 39), zero failures, wasm check green, clippy 0 new warnings, security-grep clean, wasm dep graph confirmed unaffected by datachannel dep (cargo tree wasm check = empty).
